https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_HGiB9CNzvs
sd-webui-lobe-theme(原kitchen-theme)下載網址
https://github.com/canisminor1990/sd-webui-lobe-theme

影片章節
00:27 第一部分 客製化stable diffusion操作介面
03:27 第二部分 lobe-theme(原kitchen-theme)的安裝與設定


其他老阿貝分享的影片:
將AI繪圖stablde diffusion裝到自己的google雲端硬碟系列:
01.安裝stable diffusion。https://youtu.be/0_a0vSR9_q8
02.checkpoint、lora、extensions安裝技巧。https://youtu.be/5Pv8PcvoD7E

stable diffusion改成中文(簡體、繁體)介面 https://youtu.be/U6oZFYvP4SM

stable diffusion AI繪圖本地安裝:
一、n卡和CPU運算適用(手動安裝) https://youtu.be/3G5XGyVKbJY
二、n卡和CPU運算適用(自動安裝) https://youtu.be/rSVdLfwtYbU
三、AMD顯卡專用(手動安裝) https://youtu.be/MwI0WtrYJhI
四、InvokeAI AMD N卡 CPU適用 https://youtu.be/4Ri9Chj-ML0

stable diffusion AI繪圖免費雲端使用:
一、Colaboratory雲端系統 https://youtu.be/EV47frX3m8

模型models(textual inversion、hypernetworks、checkpoint、lora)管理:
一、兩種Lora的使用方式 https://youtu.be/gf6NwBBM4-o
二、學AI繪圖必看的網站Civic AI https://youtu.be/DQ4kM7atJnw
三、超強的Models for civit AI管理小工具 https://youtu.be/x4tPWPmeAgM
四、Stable diffusion Models超簡單分類法 https://youtu.be/ZxN3pZSmeEY

咒語prompt:
一、AI繪圖最基礎的構圖教學 https://youtu.be/r-5JllIDYwg
二、三個Stable Diffusion prompt的提示字管理小工具 ，從陽春版到進階版還有最終加強版https://youtu.be/zHTeZxzJ314

空間不足怎麼辦
一、stable diffusion  3 tips for 基本的檔案管理技巧 https://youtu.be/zCRWEyZ5aYs

其他測試
一、Stable diffusion reimagine和clipdrop老阿貝不專業老實說評測 https://youtu.be/0c7CIEXbViY
====
        
First of all, I would like to thank these two great recommendations. Yuwu3308 already recommended it a month ago,. but at that time, the old Abe tested it, and there was still a problem with compatibility, so I didn’t share the video. . Capacitance has been improved a lot. I made a special video to share with you. The main function of this extension is to allow you to easily customize the original operation interface of the stable diffusion web UI. The. first part is to customize the operation interface of stable diffusion. This screen is opened The logo and text of the stable diffusion web UI can be customized. After entering the stable diffusion operation interface, move the mouse to the far left, and a screen like this will pop up,. and then move the mouse to the right, and a screen like this will appear. Move the mouse to this You can change the size of the left and right sides. Pull down the screen to generate and run the image. The block will be fixed. This function is quite recommended, but it is written in the description that this function. is still in the experimental stage. Next, the logo and text in the upper left corner can be used. Change it yourself.

to compare it with the original interface. Let’s take a look first. The top column. is now placed on the right side. Move the mouse to the outside. The slider bar will be closed. and then moved again. Because of the settings here, after setting It will not be changed often and then it will be hidden. It is also very convenient to change it. You don’t need to pull the screen to the top. If you need to fix it, don’t let it hide. You can also click the small icon here to fix it. It’s. very convenient. Come again It is the extra networks here,. some commonly used models modules. will be placed on the far right of the screen and the operation method on the left is exactly the same. , which is quite convenient. Adding LORA does not need to move the screen up and down all the time.

. The block of this running picture. will move with the movement of the screen. Sometimes it needs to be moved up and down in the adjustment of some parameters. Now this block can be placed here independently,. and then the block here is. replaced. That’s right,. I just forgot to say that when the screen is moved up and down,. this side is fixed. so that we can look at the running picture and do other parameter settings. This function is greatly promoted, but it is currently experimental, I don’t know What's the problem. ? You can drag and drop to set the size of the screen like this. There is no way. with the native one. The native user interface is more like stacking all the functions down and down. There is a day and night switch button here that allows you to switch between white and white. The button with a black background. allows you to directly open the civit AI webpage.

The button next to it is a feedback to the author.

The second part of lobe-theme (formerly kitchen-theme) installation and settings.

are the same. Go to the bottom of the video. and click the lobe theme download URL. and click the code Click the copy button in. the drop-down menu. to close the lobe theme github page,. go back to the stable diffusion web UI. , click extensions. , click install from URL,. click here and right-click, paste the installation URL you just copied,. and click install. When these words appear, it means the download is complete. Click installed. , click Apply and restart UI,.

when such a screen appears, it means the installation is successful. At the beginning,. the operation method of this screen is like this. The old Abbe finds it inconvenient to move the mouse over and it will appear. It will be more convenient. Click the setting button here. to set it. Change the displayed language. to Chinese first,. pull down the setting screen,. click Apply and restart Interface,. and then click the lobe theme setting button. , so that all settings are in Chinese culture. Reduce the animation and check it according to your preference. Currently only You can choose the color you like as the main color. when you see the gradient animation.

The old Abbe likes to be plain, so I choose the white. Logo type. If you don’t like the default one, you can choose to customize it. Here you can put the logo you want. . These three formats are supported. to try the simplest Emoji emoticon. What is Emoji emoticon? This is what. we want to get the emoji URL. Suppose we want this emoji. Use the mouse to select the emoji, drag it to the side and release it, and you will get it. Select the URL of the. emoji and copy it back. to the stable diffusion lobe theme setting screen,. paste the URL you just copied,. and the emoji emoticon will appear,. then you can customize the title,.

use the SVG icon to tick.

, load the font, and beautify it Check. the zooming and scrolling of the display mode of the prompt text box. I don’t know if it’s a bug. These two old Abbes can’t test it out. If you can, please leave a message and share it. Checking the syntax highlighting of the prompt is better for identifying the prompt word. editor. . Old Abbe thinks it’s a little redundant, so I don’t tick it.

This is the prompt word editor. If you know this useful place, please leave a message and share it. If.

you don’t tick it,.

it’s double-column mode. Check. the double-column mode, which is to divide it into two columns. Different blocks. do not affect each other when the screen is moved up or down. This function is easy to use, so you have to tick it.

and then hide the footer. What is a footer? This is a strange translation. This is the screen without the hidden footer. This is the hidden page. Whether. you want to hide the footer or not is up to you guys. Quickly set the sidebar and check it to enable it. This is the silder bar on the right. Check it. to expand by default. You can untick it.

Floating means moving the mouse to open it, and moving it out hides it and fixes it. Click the open or close button. to select the floating. default width is the open width of the sidebar. The setting of the right sidebar is similar to the above. The difference.

is that there is a picture on the right sidebar, so you can set the size of the picture here. . Click Apply and restart the interface. to test it out. If you are not satisfied with the width, you can go to the edge. Press and hold the mouse to drag the width. to be the same on both sides. You can drag the width. The above is today’s sharing. Thanks again for the two great recommendations. If the video is right If you are helpful, remember to. subscribe, share and press the small bell for the old. Abe.

item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=mV1VxgFdNT4 本影片內容為老阿貝DragGan試玩教學與心得分享，各位大大有知道DragGan的UNDO在哪裡的，再麻煩分享一下。 感溫。 DragGan相關影片: DragGAN Nvidia windows版本https://youtu.be/c1rdHISzAmo DragGAN 使用colab試用Drag Your GAN 。https://youtu.be/eamtjuwc4uI 其他老阿貝分享的影片: 將AI繪圖stablde diffusion裝到自己的google雲端硬碟系列: 01.安裝stable diffusion。https://youtu.be/0_a0vSR9_q8 02.checkpoint、lora、extensions安裝技巧。https://youtu.be/5Pv8PcvoD7E stable diffusion改成中文(簡體、繁體)介面 https://youtu.be/U6oZFYvP4SM stable diffusion AI繪圖本地安裝: 一、n卡和CPU運算適用(手動安裝) https://youtu.be/3G5XGyVKbJY 二、n卡和CPU運算適用(自動安裝) https://youtu.be/rSVdLfwtYbU 三、AMD顯卡專用(手動安裝) https://youtu.be/MwI0WtrYJhI 四、InvokeAI AMD N卡 CPU適用 https://youtu.be/4Ri9Chj-ML0 stable diffusion AI繪圖免費雲端使用: 一、Colaboratory雲端系統 https://youtu.be/EV47frX3m8 模型models(textual inversion、hypernetworks、checkpoint、lora)管理: 一、兩種Lora的使用方式 https://youtu.be/gf6NwBBM4-o 二、學AI繪圖必看的網站Civic AI https://youtu.be/DQ4kM7atJnw 三、超強的Models for civit AI管理小工具 https://youtu.be/x4tPWPmeAgM 四、Stable diffusion Models超簡單分類法 https://youtu.be/ZxN3pZSmeEY 咒語prompt: 一、AI繪圖最基礎的構圖教學 https://youtu.be/r-5JllIDYwg 二、三個Stable Diffusion prompt的提示字管理小工具 ，從陽春版到進階版還有最終加強版https://youtu.be/zHTeZxzJ314 空間不足怎麼辦 一、stable diffusion 3 tips for 基本的檔案管理技巧 https://youtu.be/zCRWEyZ5aYs 其他測試 一、Stable diffusion reimagine和clipdrop老阿貝不專業老實說評測 https://youtu.be/0c7CIEXbViY Kevin MacLeod創作的「Canon in D Major」是依據 創用 CC (姓名標示) 4.0 授權使用。 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ 來源： http://incompetech.com/music/royalty-free/index.html?isrc=USUAN1100301 藝人： http://incompetech.com/ ==== The following is the old Abe’s trial play of DragGan. After playing for a while, he finally knows the function of MASK. Simply put, the area where MASK is activated is the effective area. . Under the skirt, when the skirt is shortened, the other areas will not change. It’s. OK to go to this side. If. it is shortened, it will not be what you imagined, but it will become a horror movie. People who want to watch horror movies can pretend it by themselves. Let’s have a look. This side wants to turn his head straight, and. this side wants to make his clothes short-sleeved,. but he fails. . Can he show his belly? Don’t be stupid, or fail. This DragGan lacks a very important function..... .If. there is no UNDO and REDO. , if you fail, you have to start over and change the photo. , but it turns out to be a negative value, and there is an error. The DragGan word is too small. It is different from the official website. I don’t know. how to make the word bigger. OK, I’ll choose this victim,. the second victim will have a better effect,. and then I’ll find the next victim. After familiarizing myself with some tricks, the picture will become better and better. Let’s take a look at the original picture. It’s not bad, right? Change the action. to other pictures. and try to see the human face. . I closed my eyes for a long time and. it took a long time to complete. Finally, the closed eyes opened again. In fact, you can use the mask to avoid this problem. I. originally wanted to let his hairline go down. But no matter how I tried it, I failed. and finally gave up on. DragGan without UNDO. Every step was thrilling. Then,. the back of this suffering master was completely broken. I don’t know if I can save it. I just came. back, so I had to start DragGAN again. It was really shocking every step of the way. One wrong step, one wrong step, all wrong. DragGan really takes time to open and close eyes. !!!!! Another wrong step. seems to be saved. Wow... DragGan does not have UNDO, is it really a big failure. or does it actually have, It’s just that the old Abe doesn’t know, but if. anyone knows, let me share with you where is DragGan’s UNDO. . The above is not professional today. . Thank you for your support. , I wish you health and happiness, old Abe stepped down and bowed.

The DragGan word is too small. It is different from the official website. I don’t know. how to make the word bigger. OK, I’ll choose this victim,. the second victim will have a better effect,. and then I’ll find the next victim. After familiarizing myself with some tricks, the picture will become better and better. Let’s take a look at the original picture. It’s not bad, right? Change the action. to other pictures. and try to see the human face. . I closed my eyes for a long time and. it took a long time to complete. Finally, the closed eyes opened again. In fact, you can use the mask to avoid this problem. I. originally wanted to let his hairline go down. But no matter how I tried it, I failed. and finally gave up on. DragGan without UNDO. Every step was thrilling. Then,. the back of this suffering master was completely broken. I don’t know if I can save it. I just came. back, so I had to start DragGAN again. It was really shocking every step of the way. One wrong step, one wrong step, all wrong. DragGan really takes time to open and close eyes. !!!!! Another wrong step. seems to be saved. Wow... DragGan does not have UNDO, is it really a big failure. or does it actually have, It’s just that the old Abe doesn’t know, but if. anyone knows, let me share with you where is DragGan’s UNDO. .
